message:
fix(orchestrator): ensure reflections directory exists before lock acquisition (#14)

The `cm reflect` command could fail with "Could not acquire lock" on fresh
installs where ~/.cass-memory/reflections/ doesn't exist. The withLock
mechanism has ENOENT handling, but each retry counts against the max retries,
which could be exhausted before the directory was successfully created.

Fix: Call ensureDir() on the parent directory before attempting lock
acquisition, guaranteeing the reflections directory exists.

Added test to verify the fix works on fresh installs without pre-existing
reflections directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
